title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Mango Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Mango Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Mango Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mango Hotels:
Mango Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mango Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
